_instructions: Fill this out in Session 1. Save as mockups/<slug>/design-brief.json. This file drives Sessions 2 and 3 — no skill files needed after this.

style.name: e.g. Editorial Bold
style.description: One sentence — what makes this style distinct for this client

palette.note: CTA must not be #F97316. Primary must not be #1C1917 unless confirmed from design system.

fonts.heading: Font Name, weight e.g. Playfair Display 800

heroLayout: one of: full-bleed-image | centered-minimal | split-screen-stats | video-background | bold-typographic | before-after-slider
heroLayoutReason: One sentence why this layout suits this client

motion.personality: one of: snappy | professional | luxury | playful
motion.notes: Any specific motion decisions for this brand

cardStyle: one of: dark-elevated | outlined | glassmorphism | flat-light | bordered-minimal
cardStyleReason: Why this card style suits the brand
antiSamenessChecks: Specific visual difference 1 from generic dark/orange tradie site
antiPatterns: Things to avoid for this industry/style e.g. no glassmorphism, no sans-serif headlines

componentNotes.Nav: e.g. dark bg with logo left, phone right, CTA button in brand CTA colour
componentNotes.Hero: e.g. split screen — left: headline + stats + spring CTA, right: full-height image. Cycling words: [word1, word2, word3]
componentNotes.TrustBar: e.g. 3 stats in a dark band — only if stats data exists
componentNotes.Services: e.g. 4-card outlined grid, navy border, no fill, icon top-left in CTA colour
componentNotes.About: e.g. two-column, image left, text right, credentials as inline badges
componentNotes.Gallery: e.g. masonry grid, hover zoom, before/after slider for reno shots
componentNotes.Process: e.g. horizontal numbered steps, connecting line, links to #quote
componentNotes.Testimonials: e.g. carousel of 3, returns null if empty
componentNotes.QuoteForm: e.g. dark section, minimal fields, no glassmorphism — flat style to match brand
componentNotes.CTA: e.g. full-width section, large headline, two buttons side by side
componentNotes.Footer: e.g. 3-column: logo+tagline, services list, contact details + service areas
componentNotes.FloatingCTA: e.g. scroll-triggered at 500px, phone + quote buttons, AnimatePresence

21stdevInspirationNotes: Key patterns found from 21st.dev searches — reference these when building Hero and Services

seo.title: Primary Service City | Business Name
seo.description: Max 160 chars. Service + location + USP + soft CTA.
seo.keywords: service city, business name, local service NZ

heroFalAiPrompt: Only fill if no hero image exists and layout requires one. e.g. 'Auckland plumber working under kitchen sink, natural light, photorealistic, professional'
